title: List sessions
summary: List active and recent sessions with agent, environment, status, usage, and timestamps.

response.name: data
response.description: Session envelopes visible to the current workspace.

title: Create session
summary: Create an executable agent session in an environment. Sessions persist a resumable event log and can be continued through messages or raw events.

parameters.name: agent
parameters.description: Agent id, or an object with an id and optional version.

parameters.name: environment_id
parameters.description: Environment template used to prepare the session runtime.

parameters.name: resources
parameters.description: Files, GitHub repositories, or memory stores mounted into the session.

parameters.name: vault_ids
parameters.description: Credential vault ids available to tools during this session.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Opaque key-value tags for audit and external bookkeeping.

response.name: agent
response.description: Pinned agent id, name, and version used by this session.

response.name: usage
response.description: Input and output token counters recorded by the runtime.

title: Get session
summary: Fetch one session envelope including current status, resources, usage, and pinned agent/environment metadata.

title: List session events
summary: Read the durable event log for a session. Use after non-streaming runs or to reconstruct a timeline.

title: Append raw event
summary: Append one or more user.* events to a session log. This is lower-level than the message convenience endpoint.

parameters.name: events
parameters.description: Array of user.* events. Each event must be an object with a non-empty string type.

response.name: accepted
response.description: True when the event batch was accepted.

title: Send message
summary: Append a user message and run the agent loop. Set stream to true for Server-Sent Events compatible with browser clients and SDK iterators.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: User message text or structured content blocks.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: When true, returns an SSE stream of session and agent events.

response.name: event
response.description: Streaming event when stream is true.

response.name: accepted
response.description: True when stream is false and the message was accepted.

title: Stream session events
summary: Subscribe to live Server-Sent Events for a running session.

title: Stop session
summary: Request cancellation for the active run in a session.

title: Delete session
summary: Delete a session and its runtime state from the local workspace.

response.name: deleted
response.description: True when the session was deleted.
